name: Technical Writer
description: Writes and maintains a project's documentation — READMEs, guides, references, changelogs — as pull requests, accurate to the code and in the project's own voice.

bootstrap: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates curl git jq unzip zip rsync openssh-client ripgrep fd-find less nano && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
command -v fd >/dev/null || (command -v fdfind >/dev/null && ln -s "$(command -v fdfind)" /usr/local/bin/fd) || true
